```properties
# Application
quarkus.application.name=payment-service
quarkus.http.port=8080

# Datasource
quarkus.datasource.db-kind=h2
quarkus.datasource.jdbc.url=jdbc:h2:mem:payments;DB_CLOSE_DELAY=-1
quarkus.datasource.username=sa
quarkus.datasource.password=

# Hibernate
quarkus.hibernate-orm.database.generation=drop-and-create
quarkus.hibernate-orm.log.sql=true
quarkus.hibernate-orm.sql-load-script=import.sql

# JWT Configuration
mp.jwt.verify.publickey.location=publicKey.pem
mp.jwt.verify.issuer=https://payment.example.com
smallrye.jwt.sign.key.location=privateKey.pem

# OIDC Configuration (alternative for OAuth2)
quarkus.oidc.enabled=false

# Security - Combined roles in single permission block for /payments/*
quarkus.http.auth.permission.authenticated.paths=/payments/*
quarkus.http.auth.permission.authenticated.roles=user,admin

# CORS
quarkus.http.cors=true
quarkus.http.cors.origins=*
quarkus.http.cors.methods=GET,POST,PUT,PATCH,DELETE,OPTIONS
quarkus.http.cors.headers=accept,authorization,content-type,x-requested-with
```

```java
package com.payment.entity;

import io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase;
import jakarta.persistence.*;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;

@Entity
@Table(name = "payments")
public class Payment extends PanacheEntityBase {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    public Long id;

    @Column(nullable = false, unique = true)
    public String paymentNumber;

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 19, scale = 4)
    public BigDecimal totalAmount;

    @Column(nullable = false, length = 3)
    public String currency;

    @Enumerated(EnumType.STRING)
    @Column(nullable = false)
    public PaymentStatus status;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public String payerName;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public String payerEmail;

    @Column
    public String description;

    @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
    public LocalDateTime createdAt;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public LocalDateTime updatedAt;

    @OneToMany(mappedBy = "payment", cascade = CascadeType.ALL, orphanRemoval = true, fetch = FetchType.LAZY)
    public List<PaymentItem> items = new ArrayList<>();

    @PrePersist
    public void prePersist() {
        createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }

    @PreUpdate
    public void preUpdate() {
        updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }

    public enum PaymentStatus {
        PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED
    }

    public static Payment findByPaymentNumber(String paymentNumber) {
        return find("paymentNumber", paymentNumber).firstResult();
    }

    public static List<Payment> findByStatus(PaymentStatus status) {
        return list("status", status);
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.entity;

import io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheEntityBase;
import jakarta.persistence.*;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;

@Entity
@Table(name = "payment_items")
public class PaymentItem extends PanacheEntityBase {

    @Id
    @GeneratedValue(strategy = GenerationType.IDENTITY)
    public Long id;

    @ManyToOne(fetch = FetchType.EAGER)
    @JoinColumn(name = "payment_id", nullable = false)
    public Payment payment;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public String description;

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 19, scale = 4)
    public BigDecimal amount;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public Integer quantity;

    @Column(nullable = false, precision = 19, scale = 4)
    public BigDecimal unitPrice;

    @Column(nullable = false)
    public String sku;

    @Column(nullable = false, updatable = false)
    public LocalDateTime createdAt;

    @PrePersist
    public void prePersist() {
        createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
    }

    public static PaymentItem findBySku(String sku) {
        return find("sku", sku).firstResult();
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.dto;

import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import jakarta.validation.constraints.*;
import java.util.List;

public class PaymentRequest {

    @NotBlank(message = "Payment number is required")
    @Size(min = 10, max = 50, message = "Payment number must be between 10 and 50 characters")
    @Pattern(regexp = "^[A-Z0-9-]+$", message = "Payment number must contain only uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens")
    public String paymentNumber;

    @NotNull(message = "Total amount is required")
    @DecimalMin(value = "0.01", message = "Total amount must be greater than 0")
    @Digits(integer = 15, fraction = 4, message = "Total amount format is invalid")
    public java.math.BigDecimal totalAmount;

    @NotBlank(message = "Currency is required")
    @Size(min = 3, max = 3, message = "Currency must be exactly 3 characters")
    @Pattern(regexp = "^[A-Z]{3}$", message = "Currency must be a valid ISO currency code")
    public String currency;

    @NotBlank(message = "Payer name is required")
    @Size(min = 2, max = 100, message = "Payer name must be between 2 and 100 characters")
    public String payerName;

    @NotBlank(message = "Payer email is required")
    @Email(message = "Payer email must be valid")
    public String payerEmail;

    @Size(max = 500, message = "Description must not exceed 500 characters")
    public String description;

    @Valid
    @NotEmpty(message = "At least one payment item is required")
    public List<PaymentItemRequest> items;
}
```

```java
package com.payment.dto;

import jakarta.validation.constraints.*;
import java.math.BigDecimal;

public class PaymentItemRequest {

    @NotBlank(message = "Description is required")
    @Size(max = 200, message = "Description must not exceed 200 characters")
    public String description;

    @NotNull(message = "Amount is required")
    @DecimalMin(value = "0.01", message = "Amount must be greater than 0")
    public BigDecimal amount;

    @NotNull(message = "Quantity is required")
    @Min(value = 1, message = "Quantity must be at least 1")
    @Max(value = 9999, message = "Quantity must not exceed 9999")
    public Integer quantity;

    @NotNull(message = "Unit price is required")
    @DecimalMin(value = "0.01", message = "Unit price must be greater than 0")
    public BigDecimal unitPrice;

    @NotBlank(message = "SKU is required")
    @Size(min = 3, max = 50, message = "SKU must be between 3 and 50 characters")
    @Pattern(regexp = "^[A-Z0-9-]+$", message = "SKU must contain only uppercase letters, numbers, and hyphens")
    public String sku;
}
```

```java
package com.payment.dto;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
import jakarta.validation.constraints.*;
import java.math.BigDecimal;

/**
 * Request DTO for field-level partial update (PATCH) of a Payment.
 * All fields are optional - only non-null fields will be updated.
 */
public class PaymentPatchRequest {

    @DecimalMin(value = "0.01", message = "Total amount must be greater than 0")
    @Digits(integer = 15, fraction = 4, message = "Total amount format is invalid")
    @JsonProperty("total_amount")
    private BigDecimal totalAmount;

    @Size(min = 3, max = 3, message = "Currency must be exactly 3 characters")
    @Pattern(regexp = "^[A-Z]{3}$", message = "Currency must be a valid ISO currency code")
    private String currency;

    @Pattern(regexp = "^(PENDING|PROCESSING|COMPLETED|FAILED|CANCELLED)$", 
             message = "Invalid status value")
    private String status;

    @Size(min = 2, max = 100, message = "Payer name must be between 2 and 100 characters")
    @JsonProperty("payer_name")
    private String payerName;

    @Email(message = "Payer email must be valid")
    @JsonProperty("payer_email")
    private String payerEmail;

    @Size(max = 500, message = "Description must not exceed 500 characters")
    private String description;

    // Getters and Setters
    public BigDecimal getTotalAmount() { return totalAmount; }
    public void setTotalAmount(BigDecimal totalAmount) { this.totalAmount = totalAmount; }

    public String getCurrency() { return currency; }
    public void setCurrency(String currency) { this.currency = currency; }

    public String getStatus() { return status; }
    public void setStatus(String status) { this.status = status; }

    public String getPayerName() { return payerName; }
    public void setPayerName(String payerName) { this.payerName = payerName; }

    public String getPayerEmail() { return payerEmail; }
    public void setPayerEmail(String payerEmail) { this.payerEmail = payerEmail; }

    public String getDescription() { return description; }
    public void setDescription(String description) { this.description = description; }

    public boolean hasTotalAmount() { return totalAmount != null; }
    public boolean hasCurrency() { return currency != null; }
    public boolean hasStatus() { return status != null; }
    public boolean hasPayerName() { return payerName != null; }
    public boolean hasPayerEmail() { return payerEmail != null; }
    public boolean hasDescription() { return description != null; }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.dto;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

import com.payment.entity.Payment;

public class PaymentResponse {

    @JsonProperty("id")
    public Long id;

    @JsonProperty("payment_number")
    public String paymentNumber;

    @JsonProperty("total_amount")
    public BigDecimal totalAmount;

    @JsonProperty("currency")
    public String currency;

    @JsonProperty("status")
    public String status;

    @JsonProperty("payer_name")
    public String payerName;

    @JsonProperty("payer_email")
    public String payerEmail;

    @JsonProperty("description")
    public String description;

    @JsonProperty("items")
    public List<PaymentItemResponse> items;

    @JsonProperty("created_at")
    public LocalDateTime createdAt;

    @JsonProperty("updated_at")
    public LocalDateTime updatedAt;

    public static PaymentResponse fromEntity(Payment payment) {
        PaymentResponse response = new PaymentResponse();
        response.id = payment.id;
        response.paymentNumber = payment.paymentNumber;
        response.totalAmount = payment.totalAmount;
        response.currency = payment.currency;
        response.status = payment.status.name();
        response.payerName = payment.payerName;
        response.payerEmail = payment.payerEmail;
        response.description = payment.description;
        response.createdAt = payment.createdAt;
        response.updatedAt = payment.updatedAt;
        
        if (payment.items != null) {
            response.items = payment.items.stream()
                .map(PaymentItemResponse::fromEntity)
                .collect(Collectors.toList());
        }
        
        return response;
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.dto;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.annotation.JsonProperty;
import java.util.List;

/**
 * Response DTO for bulk create operations.
 */
public class BulkPaymentResponse {

    @JsonProperty("created")
    public int created;

    @JsonProperty("failed")
    public int failed;

    @JsonProperty("payments")
    public List<PaymentResponse> payments;

    @JsonProperty("errors")
    public List<BulkError> errors;

    public BulkPaymentResponse() {}

    public BulkPaymentResponse(int created, int failed, List<PaymentResponse> payments, List<BulkError> errors) {
        this.created = created;
        this.failed = failed;
        this.payments = payments;
        this.errors = errors;
    }

    public static class BulkError {
        @JsonProperty("index")
        public int index;

        @JsonProperty("payment_number")
        public String paymentNumber;

        @JsonProperty("error")
        public String error;

        public BulkError() {}

        public BulkError(int index, String paymentNumber, String error) {
            this.index = index;
            this.paymentNumber = paymentNumber;
            this.error = error;
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.repository;

import com.payment.entity.Payment;
import io.quarkus.hibernate.orm.panache.PanacheRepository;
import io.quarkus.panache.common.Parameters;
import jakarta.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;

@ApplicationScoped
public class PaymentRepository implements PanacheRepository<Payment> {

    public Optional<Payment> findByPaymentNumberOptional(String paymentNumber) {
        return find("paymentNumber", paymentNumber).firstResultOptional();
    }

    public List<Payment> findByStatus(String status) {
        return list("status = ?1", Payment.PaymentStatus.valueOf(status));
    }

    public List<Payment> findByPayerEmail(String payerEmail) {
        return list("payerEmail", payerEmail);
    }

    public List<Payment> findByDateRange(LocalDateTime start, LocalDateTime end) {
        return list("createdAt >= ?1 and createdAt <= ?2", start, end);
    }

    public List<Payment> findByMultipleStatuses(List<String> statuses) {
        return list("status in ?1", 
            statuses.stream()
                .map(s -> Payment.PaymentStatus.valueOf(s.toUpperCase()))
                .toList());
    }

    public List<Payment> searchPayments(
            String status,
            String currency,
            String payerEmail,
            LocalDateTime fromDate,
            LocalDateTime toDate) {
        
        StringBuilder query = new StringBuilder("1=1");
        Parameters params = new Parameters();

        if (status != null && !status.isBlank()) {
            query.append(" and status = :status");
            params.and("status", Payment.PaymentStatus.valueOf(status.toUpperCase()));
        }
        if (currency != null && !currency.isBlank()) {
            query.append(" and currency = :currency");
            params.and("currency", currency.toUpperCase());
        }
        if (payerEmail != null && !payerEmail.isBlank()) {
            query.append(" and payerEmail like :payerEmail");
            params.and("payerEmail", "%" + payerEmail + "%");
        }
        if (fromDate != null) {
            query.append(" and createdAt >= :fromDate");
            params.and("fromDate", fromDate);
        }
        if (toDate != null) {
            query.append(" and createdAt <= :toDate");
            params.and("toDate", toDate);
        }

        return find(query.toString(), params).list();
    }

    public boolean existsByPaymentNumber(String paymentNumber) {
        return count("paymentNumber", paymentNumber) > 0;
    }
}
```

```java
}
```

```java
package com.payment.exception;

public class PaymentNotFoundException extends RuntimeException {
    
    private final Long paymentId;
    private final String paymentNumber;

    public PaymentNotFoundException(Long paymentId) {
        super("Payment not found with id: " + paymentId);
        this.paymentId = paymentId;
        this.paymentNumber = null;
    }

    public PaymentNotFoundException(String paymentNumber) {
        super("Payment not found with payment number: " + paymentNumber);
        this.paymentId = null;
        this.paymentNumber = paymentNumber;
    }

    public Long getPaymentId() { return paymentId; }
```

```java
package com.payment.exception;

import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper;
import com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode;
import jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolation;
import jakarta.validation.ConstraintViolationException;
import jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response;
import jakarta.ws.rs.ext.ExceptionMapper;
import jakarta.ws.rs.ext.Provider;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@Provider
public class GlobalExceptionHandler implements ExceptionMapper<Exception> {

    @Override
    public Response toResponse(Exception exception) {
        if (exception instanceof PaymentNotFoundException e) {
            return buildResponse(Response.Status.NOT_FOUND, e.getMessage());
        }
        if (exception instanceof PaymentItemNotFoundException e) {
            return buildResponse(Response.Status.NOT_FOUND, e.getMessage());
        }
        if (exception instanceof ConstraintViolationException e) {
            String errors = e.getConstraintViolations().stream()
                .map(this::formatViolation)
                .collect(Collectors.joining(", "));
            return buildResponse(Response.Status.BAD_REQUEST, errors);
        }
        if (exception instanceof IllegalArgumentException e) {
            return buildResponse(Response.Status.BAD_REQUEST, e.getMessage());
        }
        if (exception instanceof SecurityException e) {
            return buildResponse(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN, e.getMessage());
        }
        
        // Log unexpected exceptions
        exception.printStackTrace();
        return buildResponse(Response.Status.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR, "An unexpected error occurred");
    }

    private String formatViolation(ConstraintViolation<?> violation) {
        return violation.getPropertyPath() + ": " + violation.getMessage();
    }

    private Response buildResponse(Response.Status status, String message) {
        try {
            ObjectMapper mapper = new ObjectMapper();
            ObjectNode node = mapper.createObjectNode();
            node.put("status", status.getStatusCode());
            node.put("error", status.getReasonPhrase());
            node.put("message", message);
            node.put("timestamp", System.currentTimeMillis());
            return Response.status(status)
                .entity(mapper.writeValueAsString(node))
                .build();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            return Response.status(status)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"" + message + "\"}")
                .build();
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.security;

import io.quarkus.security.identity.SecurityIdentity;
import jakarta.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.jwt.JsonWebToken;
import java.util.Set;

@ApplicationScoped
public class SecurityUtils {

    @Inject
    SecurityIdentity securityIdentity;

    @Inject
    JsonWebToken jwt;

    public boolean hasRole(String role) {
        return securityIdentity.hasRole(role);
    }

    public boolean hasScope(String scope) {
        Set<String> scopes = jwt.getClaim("scope");
        return scopes != null && scopes.contains(scope);
    }

    public String getCurrentUserId() {
        return jwt.getSubject();
    }

    public String getCurrentUserName() {
        return jwt.getClaim("name");
    }

    public Set<String> getCurrentUserRoles() {
        return securityIdentity.getRoles();
    }

    public boolean isAdmin() {
        return hasRole("admin") || hasScope("payment:admin");
    }

    public boolean canWrite() {
        return hasRole("admin") || hasRole("user") || 
               hasScope("payment:write") || hasScope("payment:admin");
    }

    public boolean canRead() {
        return hasRole("admin") || hasRole("user") || 
               hasScope("payment:read") || hasScope("payment:admin");
    }

    public boolean canDelete() {
        return hasRole("admin") || hasScope("payment:delete") || hasScope("payment:admin");
    }

    public boolean canBulkCreate() {
        return hasRole("admin") || hasScope("payment:admin");
    }

    public boolean canBulkWrite() {
        return canBulkCreate();
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.service;

import com.payment.dto.*;
import com.payment.entity.Payment;
import com.payment.entity.PaymentItem;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentNotFoundException;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentRepository;
import com.payment.security.SecurityUtils;
import jakarta.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import jakarta.transaction.Transactional;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.ArrayList;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@ApplicationScoped
public class PaymentService {

    @Inject
    PaymentRepository paymentRepository;

    @Inject
    SecurityUtils securityUtils;

    public List<PaymentResponse> findAll() {
        return paymentRepository.listAll().stream()
            .map(PaymentResponse::fromEntity)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    public PaymentResponse findById(Long id) {
        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentNotFoundException(id));
        return PaymentResponse.fromEntity(payment);
    }

    public PaymentResponse findByPaymentNumber(String paymentNumber) {
        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByPaymentNumberOptional(paymentNumber)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentNotFoundException(paymentNumber));
        return PaymentResponse.fromEntity(payment);
    }

    public List<PaymentResponse> search(
            String status,
            String currency,
            String payerEmail,
            LocalDateTime fromDate,
            LocalDateTime toDate) {
        return paymentRepository.searchPayments(status, currency, payerEmail, fromDate, toDate)
            .stream()
            .map(PaymentResponse::fromEntity)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    @Transactional
    public PaymentResponse create(PaymentRequest request) {
        if (!securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to create payment");
        }
        
        if (paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber(request.paymentNumber)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Payment with number " + request.paymentNumber + " already exists");
        }

        Payment payment = new Payment();
        payment.paymentNumber = request.paymentNumber;
        payment.totalAmount = request.totalAmount;
        payment.currency = request.currency.toUpperCase();
        payment.status = Payment.PaymentStatus.PENDING;
        payment.payerName = request.payerName;
        payment.payerEmail = request.payerEmail;
        payment.description = request.description;

        // Create payment items
        for (PaymentItemRequest itemRequest : request.items) {
            PaymentItem item = new PaymentItem();
            item.description = itemRequest.description;
            item.amount = itemRequest.amount;
            item.quantity = itemRequest.quantity;
            item.unitPrice = itemRequest.unitPrice;
            item.sku = itemRequest.sku;
            item.payment = payment;
            payment.items.add(item);
        }

        paymentRepository.persist(payment);
        return PaymentResponse.fromEntity(payment);
    }

    /**
     * Internal method to create a single payment without security check.
     * Used by bulkCreate within the same transaction context.
     */
    Payment createInternal(PaymentRequest request) {
        if (paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber(request.paymentNumber)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Payment with number " + request.paymentNumber + " already exists");
        }

        Payment payment = new Payment();
        payment.paymentNumber = request.paymentNumber;
        payment.totalAmount = request.totalAmount;
        payment.currency = request.currency.toUpperCase();
        payment.status = Payment.PaymentStatus.PENDING;
        payment.payerName = request.payerName;
        payment.payerEmail = request.payerEmail;
        payment.description = request.description;

        for (PaymentItemRequest itemRequest : request.items) {
            PaymentItem item = new PaymentItem();
            item.description = itemRequest.description;
            item.amount = itemRequest.amount;
            item.quantity = itemRequest.quantity;
            item.unitPrice = itemRequest.unitPrice;
            item.sku = itemRequest.sku;
            item.payment = payment;
            payment.items.add(item);
        }

        paymentRepository.persist(payment);
        return payment;
    }

    @Transactional
    public BulkPaymentResponse bulkCreate(BulkPaymentRequest request) {
        if (!securityUtils.canBulkCreate()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to create payments");
        }

        List<PaymentResponse> createdPayments = new ArrayList<>();
        List<BulkPaymentResponse.BulkError> errors = new ArrayList<>();

        for (int i = 0; i < request.payments.size(); i++) {
            try {
                PaymentRequest paymentRequest = request.payments.get(i);
                Payment payment = createInternal(paymentRequest);
                createdPayments.add(PaymentResponse.fromEntity(payment));
            } catch (Exception e) {
                String paymentNumber = "unknown";
                if (i < request.payments.size()) {
                    PaymentRequest pr = request.payments.get(i);
                    if (pr != null) {
                        paymentNumber = pr.paymentNumber;
                    }
                }
                errors.add(new BulkPaymentResponse.BulkError(i, paymentNumber, e.getMessage()));
            }
        }

        BulkPaymentResponse bulkResponse = new BulkPaymentResponse();
        bulkResponse.created = createdPayments.size();
        bulkResponse.failed = errors.size();
        bulkResponse.payments = createdPayments;
        bulkResponse.errors = errors;
        return bulkResponse;
    }

    @Transactional
    public PaymentResponse patch(Long id, PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest) {
        if (!securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to update payment");
        }

        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentNotFoundException(id));

        if (patchRequest.hasTotalAmount()) {
            payment.totalAmount = patchRequest.getTotalAmount();
        }
        if (patchRequest.hasCurrency()) {
            payment.currency = patchRequest.getCurrency().toUpperCase();
        }
        if (patchRequest.hasStatus()) {
            payment.status = Payment.PaymentStatus.valueOf(patchRequest.getStatus().toUpperCase());
        }
        if (patchRequest.hasPayerName()) {
            payment.payerName = patchRequest.getPayerName();
        }
        if (patchRequest.hasPayerEmail()) {
            payment.payerEmail = patchRequest.getPayerEmail();
        }
        if (patchRequest.hasDescription()) {
            payment.description = patchRequest.getDescription();
        }

        payment.updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();
        paymentRepository.persist(payment);
        return PaymentResponse.fromEntity(payment);
    }

    @Transactional
    public void delete(Long id) {
        if (!securityUtils.canDelete()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to delete payment");
        }

        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentNotFoundException(id));
        paymentRepository.delete(payment);
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.service;

import com.payment.dto.*;
import com.payment.entity.Payment;
import com.payment.entity.PaymentItem;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentItemNotFoundException;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentNotFoundException;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentItemRepository;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentRepository;
import com.payment.security.SecurityUtils;
import jakarta.enterprise.context.ApplicationScoped;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import jakarta.transaction.Transactional;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.stream.Collectors;

@ApplicationScoped
public class PaymentItemService {

    @Inject
    PaymentItemRepository paymentItemRepository;

    @Inject
    PaymentRepository paymentRepository;

    @Inject
    SecurityUtils securityUtils;

    public List<PaymentItemResponse> findByPaymentId(Long paymentId) {
        // Verify payment exists
        if (paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(paymentId).isEmpty()) {
            throw new PaymentNotFoundException(paymentId);
        }
        return paymentItemRepository.findByPaymentId(paymentId)
            .stream()
            .map(PaymentItemResponse::fromEntity)
            .collect(Collectors.toList());
    }

    public PaymentItemResponse findById(Long id) {
        PaymentItem item = paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(id)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentItemNotFoundException(id));
        return PaymentItemResponse.fromEntity(item);
    }

    @Transactional
    public PaymentItemResponse create(Long paymentId, PaymentItemRequest request) {
        if (!securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to create payment item");
        }

        Payment payment = paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(paymentId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentNotFoundException(paymentId));

        PaymentItem item = new PaymentItem();
        item.description = request.description;
        item.amount = request.amount;
        item.quantity = request.quantity;
        item.unitPrice = request.unitPrice;
        item.sku = request.sku;
        item.payment = payment;
        payment.items.add(item);

        paymentItemRepository.persist(item);
        return PaymentItemResponse.fromEntity(item);
    }

    @Transactional
    public void delete(Long paymentId, Long itemId) {
        if (!securityUtils.canDelete()) {
            throw new SecurityException("Insufficient permissions to delete payment item");
        }

        // Verify payment exists
        if (paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(paymentId).isEmpty()) {
            throw new PaymentNotFoundException(paymentId);
        }

        PaymentItem item = paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(itemId)
            .orElseThrow(() -> new PaymentItemNotFoundException(itemId));

        if (!item.payment.id.equals(paymentId)) {
            throw new IllegalArgumentException("Payment item does not belong to the specified payment");
        }

        paymentItemRepository.delete(item);
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.resource;

import com.payment.dto.*;
import com.payment.service.PaymentService;
import com.payment.security.SecurityUtils;
import io.quarkus.security.Authenticated;
import jakarta.annotation.security.RolesAllowed;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import jakarta.validation.Valid;
import jakarta.validation.constraints.*;
import jakarta.ws.rs.*;
import jakarta.ws.rs.core.MediaType;
import jakarta.ws.rs.core.Response;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.jwt.JsonWebToken;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.Operation;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.enums.SecuritySchemeType;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.media.Content;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.media.Schema;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.parameters.Parameter;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.responses.APIResponse;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.security.SecurityScheme;
import org.eclipse.microprofile.openapi.annotations.tags.Tag;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.time.format.DateTimeParseException;
import java.util.List;

@Path("/payments")
@Produces(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
@Consumes(MediaType.APPLICATION_JSON)
@Tag(name = "Payment", description = "Payment management operations")
@SecurityScheme(securitySchemeName = "jwt", type = SecuritySchemeType.HTTP, scheme = "bearer")
public class PaymentResource {

    @Inject
    PaymentService paymentService;

    @Inject
    SecurityUtils securityUtils;

    @Inject
    JsonWebToken jwt;

    @GET
    @Operation(summary = "List all payments", description = "Retrieve all payments with optional filtering")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "200", description = "List of payments")
    @RolesAllowed({"user", "admin"})
    public Response list(
            @Parameter(description = "Filter by status (PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED)")
            @QueryParam("status") String status,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Filter by currency (ISO 4217)")
            @QueryParam("currency") String currency,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Filter by payer email")
            @QueryParam("payerEmail") String payerEmail,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Filter from date (ISO 8601)")
            @QueryParam("fromDate") String fromDate,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Filter to date (ISO 8601)")
            @QueryParam("toDate") String toDate,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Page number (0-based)")
            @QueryParam("page") @DefaultValue("0") @Min(0) int page,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Page size")
            @QueryParam("size") @DefaultValue("20") @Min(1) @Max(100) int size) {
        
        // Check OAuth2 scope if JWT is present
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canRead()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:read or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        
        // Validate currency format manually if provided
        if (currency != null && !currency.isBlank()) {
            if (!currency.matches("^[A-Z]{3}$")) {
                return Response.status(Response.Status.BAD_REQUEST)
                    .entity("{\"error\":\"Currency must be a valid 3-letter ISO code\"}")
                    .build();
            }
        }
        
        // Validate email format manually if provided
        if (payerEmail != null && !payerEmail.isBlank()) {
            if (!payerEmail.matches("^[A-Za-z0-9+_.-]+@[A-Za-z0-9.-]+$")) {
                return Response.status(Response.Status.BAD_REQUEST)
                    .entity("{\"error\":\"Invalid email format\"}")
                    .build();
            }
        }
        
        // Parse and validate date parameters
        LocalDateTime from = parseDateTime(fromDate, "fromDate");
        LocalDateTime to = parseDateTime(toDate, "toDate");
        
        // Parse and validate status
        if (status != null && !status.isBlank()) {
            try {
                com.payment.entity.Payment.PaymentStatus.valueOf(status.toUpperCase());
            } catch (IllegalArgumentException e) {
                return Response.status(Response.Status.BAD_REQUEST)
                    .entity("{\"error\":\"Invalid status value. Valid values: PENDING, PROCESSING, COMPLETED, FAILED, CANCELLED\"}")
                    .build();
            }
        }

        List<PaymentResponse> payments = paymentService.search(status, currency, payerEmail, from, to);
        return Response.ok(payments).build();
    }

    @GET
    @Path("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "Get payment by ID", description = "Retrieve a specific payment by its ID")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "200", description = "Payment found")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"user", "admin"})
    public Response getById(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("id") @Min(1) Long id) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope if JWT is present
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canRead()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:read or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        PaymentResponse payment = paymentService.findById(id);
        return Response.ok(payment).build();
    }

    @GET
    @Path("/number/{paymentNumber}")
    @Operation(summary = "Get payment by payment number", description = "Retrieve a payment by its unique payment number")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "200", description = "Payment found")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"user", "admin"})
    public Response getByPaymentNumber(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment number", required = true)
            @PathParam("paymentNumber") 
            @Pattern(regexp = "^[A-Z0-9-]+$", message = "Invalid payment number format")
            String paymentNumber) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope if JWT is present
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canRead()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:read or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        PaymentResponse payment = paymentService.findByPaymentNumber(paymentNumber);
        return Response.ok(payment).build();
    }

    @POST
    @Operation(summary = "Create payment", description = "Create a new payment with items")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "201", description = "Payment created")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "400", description = "Invalid request data")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "401", description = "Unauthorized")
    @Authenticated
    public Response create(@Valid PaymentRequest request) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for write operations
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:write or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        PaymentResponse payment = paymentService.create(request);
        return Response.status(Response.Status.CREATED).entity(payment).build();
    }

    @POST
    @Path("/bulk")
    @Operation(summary = "Bulk create payments", description = "Create multiple payments in a single request")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "200", description = "Bulk operation completed")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "400", description = "Invalid request data")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "401", description = "Unauthorized")
    @RolesAllowed({"admin"})
    public Response bulkCreate(@Valid BulkPaymentRequest request) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for bulk operations - requires admin scope
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canBulkCreate()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        BulkPaymentResponse result = paymentService.bulkCreate(request);
        return Response.ok(result).build();
    }

    @PATCH
    @Path("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "Patch payment", description = "Partially update a payment (field-level update)")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "200", description = "Payment updated")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "400", description = "Invalid request data")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"admin"})
    public Response patch(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("id") @Min(1) Long id,
            @Valid PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for write operations
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:write or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        PaymentResponse payment = paymentService.patch(id, patchRequest);
        return Response.ok(payment).build();
    }

    @DELETE
    @Path("/{id}")
    @Operation(summary = "Delete payment", description = "Delete a payment by ID")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "204", description = "Payment deleted")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"admin"})
    public Response delete(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("id") @Min(1) Long id) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for delete operations
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canDelete()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:delete or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        paymentService.delete(id);
        return Response.noContent().build();
    }

    private LocalDateTime parseDateTime(String dateStr, String paramName) {
        if (dateStr == null || dateStr.isBlank()) {
            return null;
        }
        try {
            return LocalDateTime.parse(dateStr);
        } catch (DateTimeParseException e) {
            throw new BadRequestException("Invalid " + paramName + " format. Expected ISO 8601 format.");
        }
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.resource;

    @POST

    @APIResponse(responseCode = "400", description = "Invalid request data")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"admin"})
    public Response create(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("paymentId") @Min(1) Long paymentId,
            
            @Valid PaymentItemRequest request) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for write operations
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canWrite()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:write or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        PaymentItemResponse item = paymentItemService.create(paymentId, request);
        return Response.status(Response.Status.CREATED).entity(item).build();
    }

    @DELETE
    @Path("/{itemId}")
    @Operation(summary = "Delete payment item", description = "Remove an item from a payment")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "204", description = "Payment item deleted")
    @APIResponse(responseCode = "404", description = "Payment or item not found")
    @RolesAllowed({"admin"})
    public Response delete(
            @Parameter(description = "Payment ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("paymentId") @Min(1) Long paymentId,
            
            @Parameter(description = "Item ID", required = true)
            @PathParam("itemId") @Min(1) Long itemId) {
        // Check OAuth2 scope for delete operations
        if (jwt.getRawToken() != null && !securityUtils.canDelete()) {
            return Response.status(Response.Status.FORBIDDEN)
                .entity("{\"error\":\"Insufficient scope. Required: payment:delete or payment:admin\"}")
                .build();
        }
        paymentItemService.delete(paymentId, itemId);
        return Response.noContent().build();
    }
}
```

```java
    // ==================== GET /payments/{paymentId}/items Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(1)
    @DisplayName("GET /payments/{paymentId}/items - Should return all items for payment")
```

```java
package com.payment.service;

import com.payment.dto.*;
import com.payment.entity.Payment;
import com.payment.entity.PaymentItem;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentNotFoundException;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentRepository;
import com.payment.security.SecurityUtils;
import io.quarkus.test.junit.QuarkusTest;
import io.quarkus.test.junit.mockito.InjectMock;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.*;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.*;
import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.*;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;

@QuarkusTest
@TestMethodOrder(MethodOrderer.OrderAnnotation.class)
public class PaymentServiceTest {

    @Inject
    PaymentService paymentService;

    @InjectMock
    PaymentRepository paymentRepository;

    @InjectMock
    SecurityUtils securityUtils;

    private Payment samplePayment;
    private PaymentRequest sampleRequest;

    @BeforeEach
    void setupSamplePayment() {
        samplePayment = new Payment();
        samplePayment.id = 1L;
        samplePayment.paymentNumber = "PAY-2024-001";
        samplePayment.totalAmount = new BigDecimal("150.00");
        samplePayment.currency = "USD";
        samplePayment.status = Payment.PaymentStatus.PENDING;
        samplePayment.payerName = "John Doe";
        samplePayment.payerEmail = "john@example.com";
        samplePayment.description = "Test payment";
        samplePayment.createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
        samplePayment.updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

        sampleRequest = new PaymentRequest();
        sampleRequest.paymentNumber = "PAY-2024-001";
        sampleRequest.totalAmount = new BigDecimal("150.00");
        sampleRequest.currency = "USD";
        sampleRequest.payerName = "John Doe";
        sampleRequest.payerEmail = "john@example.com";
        sampleRequest.description = "Test payment";
    }

    // ==================== findById Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(1)
    @DisplayName("findById should return payment when found")
    void testFindById_Found() {
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        PaymentResponse result = paymentService.findById(1L);

        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.id).isEqualTo(1L);
        assertThat(result.paymentNumber).isEqualTo("PAY-2024-001");
        assertThat(result.status).isEqualTo("PENDING");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(2)
    @DisplayName("findById should throw exception when not found")
    void testFindById_NotFound() {
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.findById(999L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("999");
    }

    // ==================== search Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(10)
    @DisplayName("search should filter by status")
    void testSearch_ByStatus() {
        List<Payment> payments = Arrays.asList(samplePayment);
        when(paymentRepository.searchPayments(eq("PENDING"), isNull(), isNull(), isNull(), isNull()))
            .thenReturn(payments);

        List<PaymentResponse> result = paymentService.search("PENDING", null, null, null, null);

        assertThat(result).hasSize(1);
        assertThat(result.get(0).status).isEqualTo("PENDING");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(11)
    @DisplayName("search should filter by currency")
    void testSearch_ByCurrency() {
        List<Payment> payments = Arrays.asList(samplePayment);
        when(paymentRepository.searchPayments(isNull(), eq("USD"), isNull(), isNull(), isNull()))
            .thenReturn(payments);

        List<PaymentResponse> result = paymentService.search(null, "USD", null, null, null);

        assertThat(result).hasSize(1);
        assertThat(result.get(0).currency).isEqualTo("USD");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(12)
    @DisplayName("search should filter by date range")
    void testSearch_ByDateRange() {
        LocalDateTime from = LocalDateTime.now().minusDays(7);
        LocalDateTime to = LocalDateTime.now();
        List<Payment> payments = Arrays.asList(samplePayment);
        when(paymentRepository.searchPayments(isNull(), isNull(), isNull(), eq(from), eq(to)))
            .thenReturn(payments);

        List<PaymentResponse> result = paymentService.search(null, null, null, from, to);

        assertThat(result).hasSize(1);
    }

    // ==================== create Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(20)
    @DisplayName("create should persist payment when user has write permission")
    void testCreate_WithPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber("PAY-2024-001")).thenReturn(false);

        PaymentItemRequest itemRequest = new PaymentItemRequest();
        itemRequest.description = "Item 1";
        itemRequest.amount = new BigDecimal("50.00");
        itemRequest.quantity = 3;
        itemRequest.unitPrice = new BigDecimal("16.67");
        itemRequest.sku = "SKU-001";
        sampleRequest.items = Arrays.asList(itemRequest);

        PaymentResponse result = paymentService.create(sampleRequest);

        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.paymentNumber).isEqualTo("PAY-2024-001");
        verify(paymentRepository).persist(any(Payment.class));
    }

    @Test
    @Order(21)
    @DisplayName("create should throw SecurityException when user lacks write permission")
    void testCreate_WithoutPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(false);

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.create(sampleRequest))
            .isInstanceOf(SecurityException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("Insufficient permissions");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(22)
    @DisplayName("create should throw exception when payment number already exists")
    void testCreate_DuplicatePaymentNumber() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber("PAY-2024-001")).thenReturn(true);

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.create(sampleRequest))
            .isInstanceOf(IllegalArgumentException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("already exists");
    }

    // ==================== patch Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(30)
    @DisplayName("patch should update only provided fields")
    void testPatch_UpdateStatus() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest = new PaymentPatchRequest();
        patchRequest.setStatus("COMPLETED");

        PaymentResponse result = paymentService.patch(1L, patchRequest);

        assertThat(result.status).isEqualTo("COMPLETED");
        assertThat(result.payerName).isEqualTo("John Doe"); // Unchanged
    }

    @Test
    @Order(31)
    @DisplayName("patch should update multiple fields")
    void testPatch_UpdateMultipleFields() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest = new PaymentPatchRequest();
        patchRequest.setStatus("PROCESSING");
        patchRequest.setPayerName("Jane Doe");
        patchRequest.setTotalAmount(new BigDecimal("200.00"));

        PaymentResponse result = paymentService.patch(1L, patchRequest);

        assertThat(result.status).isEqualTo("PROCESSING");
        assertThat(result.payerName).isEqualTo("Jane Doe");
        assertThat(result.totalAmount).isEqualByComparingTo(new BigDecimal("200.00"));
    }

    @Test
    @Order(32)
    @DisplayName("patch should ignore null fields")
    void testPatch_IgnoreNullFields() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest = new PaymentPatchRequest();
        // No fields set

        PaymentResponse result = paymentService.patch(1L, patchRequest);

        assertThat(result.paymentNumber).isEqualTo("PAY-2024-001");
        assertThat(result.totalAmount).isEqualByComparingTo(new BigDecimal("150.00"));
    }

    @Test
    @Order(33)
    @DisplayName("patch should throw exception for non-existent payment")
    void testPatch_NotFound() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        PaymentPatchRequest patchRequest = new PaymentPatchRequest();
        patchRequest.setStatus("COMPLETED");

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.patch(999L, patchRequest))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class);
    }

    // ==================== delete Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(40)
    @DisplayName("delete should remove payment when user has delete permission")
    void testDelete_WithPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        paymentService.delete(1L);

        verify(paymentRepository).delete(samplePayment);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(41)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw SecurityException when user lacks delete permission")
    void testDelete_WithoutPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(false);

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.delete(1L))
            .isInstanceOf(SecurityException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("Insufficient permissions");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(42)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw exception for non-existent payment")
    void testDelete_NotFound() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentService.delete(999L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class);
    }

    // ==================== bulkCreate Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(50)
    @DisplayName("bulkCreate should process all payments in single transaction")
    void testBulkCreate_Success() {
        when(securityUtils.canBulkCreate()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber(anyString())).thenReturn(false);

        BulkPaymentRequest bulkRequest = new BulkPaymentRequest();
        bulkRequest.payments = Arrays.asList(sampleRequest, sampleRequest);

        BulkPaymentResponse result = paymentService.bulkCreate(bulkRequest);

        assertThat(result.created).isEqualTo(2);
        assertThat(result.failed).isEqualTo(0);
        assertThat(result.payments).hasSize(2);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(51)
    @DisplayName("bulkCreate should track failed items within transaction")
    void testBulkCreate_WithFailures() {
        when(securityUtils.canBulkCreate()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.existsByPaymentNumber(anyString()))
            .thenReturn(false)
            .thenReturn(true); // Second one is duplicate

        BulkPaymentRequest bulkRequest = new BulkPaymentRequest();
        bulkRequest.payments = Arrays.asList(sampleRequest, sampleRequest);

        BulkPaymentResponse result = paymentService.bulkCreate(bulkRequest);

        assertThat(result.created).isEqualTo(1);
        assertThat(result.failed).isEqualTo(1);
        assertThat(result.errors).hasSize(1);
        assertThat(result.errors.get(0).index).isEqualTo(1);
    }
}
```

```java
package com.payment.service;

import com.payment.dto.*;
import com.payment.entity.Payment;
import com.payment.entity.PaymentItem;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentItemNotFoundException;
import com.payment.exception.PaymentNotFoundException;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentItemRepository;
import com.payment.repository.PaymentRepository;
import com.payment.security.SecurityUtils;
import io.quarkus.test.junit.QuarkusTest;
import io.quarkus.test.junit.mockito.InjectMock;
import org.junit.jupiter.api.*;
import jakarta.inject.Inject;
import java.math.BigDecimal;
import java.time.LocalDateTime;
import java.util.Arrays;
import java.util.List;
import java.util.Optional;
import static org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.*;
import static org.mockito.ArgumentMatchers.*;
import static org.mockito.Mockito.*;

@QuarkusTest
@TestMethodOrder(MethodOrderer.OrderAnnotation.class)
public class PaymentItemServiceTest {

    @Inject
    PaymentItemService paymentItemService;

    @InjectMock
    PaymentItemRepository paymentItemRepository;

    @InjectMock
    PaymentRepository paymentRepository;

    @InjectMock
    SecurityUtils securityUtils;

    private Payment samplePayment;
    private PaymentItem sampleItem;
    private PaymentItemRequest sampleRequest;

    @BeforeEach
    void setupSampleItem() {
        samplePayment = new Payment();
        samplePayment.id = 1L;
        samplePayment.paymentNumber = "PAY-2024-001";
        samplePayment.totalAmount = new BigDecimal("150.00");
        samplePayment.currency = "USD";
        samplePayment.status = Payment.PaymentStatus.PENDING;
        samplePayment.payerName = "John Doe";
        samplePayment.payerEmail = "john@example.com";
        samplePayment.createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();
        samplePayment.updatedAt = LocalDateTime.now();

        sampleItem = new PaymentItem();
        sampleItem.id = 1L;
        sampleItem.payment = samplePayment;
        sampleItem.description = "Test Item";
        sampleItem.amount = new BigDecimal("50.00");
        sampleItem.quantity = 3;
        sampleItem.unitPrice = new BigDecimal("16.67");
        sampleItem.sku = "SKU-001";
        sampleItem.createdAt = LocalDateTime.now();

        sampleRequest = new PaymentItemRequest();
        sampleRequest.description = "Test Item";
        sampleRequest.amount = new BigDecimal("50.00");
        sampleRequest.quantity = 3;
        sampleRequest.unitPrice = new BigDecimal("16.67");
        sampleRequest.sku = "SKU-001";
    }

    // ==================== findByPaymentId Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(1)
    @DisplayName("findByPaymentId should return items when payment exists")
    void testFindByPaymentId_Found() {
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByPaymentId(1L))
            .thenReturn(Arrays.asList(sampleItem));

        List<PaymentItemResponse> result = paymentItemService.findByPaymentId(1L);

        assertThat(result).hasSize(1);
        assertThat(result.get(0).sku).isEqualTo("SKU-001");
        assertThat(result.get(0).amount).isEqualByComparingTo(new BigDecimal("50.00"));
    }

    @Test
    @Order(2)
    @DisplayName("findByPaymentId should throw exception when payment not found")
    void testFindByPaymentId_PaymentNotFound() {
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.findByPaymentId(999L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(3)
    @DisplayName("findByPaymentId should return empty list for payment with no items")
    void testFindByPaymentId_Empty() {
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByPaymentId(1L))
            .thenReturn(Arrays.asList());

        List<PaymentItemResponse> result = paymentItemService.findByPaymentId(1L);

        assertThat(result).isEmpty();
    }

    // ==================== findById Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(10)
    @DisplayName("findById should return item when found")
    void testFindById_Found() {
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(sampleItem));

        PaymentItemResponse result = paymentItemService.findById(1L);

        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.id).isEqualTo(1L);
        assertThat(result.sku).isEqualTo("SKU-001");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(11)
    @DisplayName("findById should throw exception when item not found")
    void testFindById_NotFound() {
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.findById(999L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentItemNotFoundException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("999");
    }

    // ==================== create Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(20)
    @DisplayName("create should persist item when user has write permission")
    void testCreate_WithPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        PaymentItemResponse result = paymentItemService.create(1L, sampleRequest);

        assertThat(result).isNotNull();
        assertThat(result.sku).isEqualTo("SKU-001");
        verify(paymentItemRepository).persist(any(PaymentItem.class));
    }

    @Test
    @Order(21)
    @DisplayName("create should throw SecurityException when user lacks write permission")
    void testCreate_WithoutPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(false);

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.create(1L, sampleRequest))
            .isInstanceOf(SecurityException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("Insufficient permissions");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(22)
    @DisplayName("create should throw exception when payment not found")
    void testCreate_PaymentNotFound() {
        when(securityUtils.canWrite()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.create(999L, sampleRequest))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class);
    }

    // ==================== delete Tests ====================

    @Test
    @Order(30)
    @DisplayName("delete should remove item when user has delete permission and item belongs to payment")
    void testDelete_WithPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(sampleItem));

        paymentItemService.delete(1L, 1L);

        verify(paymentItemRepository).delete(sampleItem);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(31)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw SecurityException when user lacks delete permission")
    void testDelete_WithoutPermission() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(false);

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.delete(1L, 1L))
            .isInstanceOf(SecurityException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("Insufficient permissions");
    }

    @Test
    @Order(32)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw exception when payment not found")
    void testDelete_PaymentNotFound() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.delete(999L, 1L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentNotFoundException.class);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(33)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw exception when item not found")
    void testDelete_ItemNotFound() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));
        when(paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(999L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.empty());

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.delete(1L, 999L))
            .isInstanceOf(PaymentItemNotFoundException.class);
    }

    @Test
    @Order(34)
    @DisplayName("delete should throw exception when item does not belong to payment")
    void testDelete_ItemBelongsToDifferentPayment() {
        when(securityUtils.canDelete()).thenReturn(true);
        when(paymentRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(samplePayment));

        Payment differentPayment = new Payment();
        differentPayment.id = 2L;
        
        PaymentItem itemFromDifferentPayment = new PaymentItem();
        itemFromDifferentPayment.id = 1L;
        itemFromDifferentPayment.payment = differentPayment;

        when(paymentItemRepository.findByIdOptional(1L))
            .thenReturn(Optional.of(itemFromDifferentPayment));

        assertThatThrownBy(() -> paymentItemService.delete(1L, 1L))
            .isInstanceOf(IllegalArgumentException.class)
            .hasMessageContaining("does not belong");
    }
}
```

Key considerations for zero-downtime PostgreSQL migration:

1. The best approach for zero-downtime major version upgrade in PostgreSQL is typically using logical replication or pg_upgrade with proper setup. Since PostgreSQL major version upgrades can't be done in-place without downtime (you need to either use pg_upgrade which requires brief downtime or use logical replication for true zero-downtime), the typical approach for zero-downtime would involve:

- Setting up a new PostgreSQL 16 instance
- Setting up logical replication from PostgreSQL 13 to PostgreSQL 16
- Letting the replication catch up
- Switching applications to point to the new database
- Promoting the new server

2. Configure logical replication on PostgreSQL 13 (create publication, replication slots)
3. Initialize replication subscription on PostgreSQL 16 and wait for full catch-up
4. Validate data integrity and consistency across both systems
5. Execute the application cutover during a maintenance window
6. Promote the new instance as primary, decommission replication, and validate post-migration
7. Monitor performance and stability while maintaining a rollback capability

**Zero-Downtime PostgreSQL 13 → 16 Migration Plan**

1. **Provision PostgreSQL 16 infrastructure** – Stand up a new PostgreSQL 16 instance with identical configuration (same postgresql.conf settings adapted for v16, identical extensions). Ensure it has equivalent or greater resources (CPU, RAM, storage I/O) than the source.

2. **Configure logical replication on source (13)** – Enable `wal_level = logical`, set `max_replication_slots` ≥ 1, create a publication for all tables (or targeted tables). Create a dedicated replication user with `REPLICATION` privilege.

3. **Validate schema compatibility and migrate DDL** – Before replication begins, audit the v13 schema against v16 changes. Check for new reserved words in v16 (e.g., `ORDER`, `LATERAL` used as identifiers), modified default settings (e.g., `wal_skip_threshold`), and deprecated features. Apply any required DDL modifications to the target 16 instance, or script them for deployment before the cutover. Logical replication does not propagate schema changes; they must be applied separately.

4. **Initialize subscription on target (16) and catch up** – Create a subscription on the 16 instance pointing to the 13 publication. Monitor the subscription lag until it reaches zero (fully caught up). This may take hours/days depending on data volume.

5. **Validate data integrity** – Run checksum/row-count comparisons between source and target on all replicated tables. Query a hash of critical tables on both sides to confirm consistency. Verify that sequences are synchronized by comparing `last_value` across both instances.

6. **Test application compatibility** – Deploy the application in a staging environment pointing to the 16 instance. Exercise core write/read workflows, test driver connectivity, and run performance regression checks. Validate that sequences advance correctly on inserts. Do not proceed to cutover until the application passes testing on v16.

7. **Execute application cutover** – During a low-traffic window, select a write-seizing strategy appropriate to your workload: **Option A (write lock)** – In a dedicated administrative session on the source, begin a transaction and execute `LOCK TABLE <all_user_tables> IN ACCESS EXCLUSIVE MODE`. Unlike `SHARE MODE`, `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE MODE` blocks all INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, and LOCK operations from other sessions, providing a complete write fence and eliminating race conditions where writes could start after you acquire the lock but before replication catches up. Wait for the subscription to confirm zero lag, then capture the `last_value` of every sequence with `SELECT last_value FROM <sequence_name>`. Store these values in a temporary table or external file for rollback reference. Proceed with connection redirection **only after** both conditions are met: (a) replication lag is zero, and (b) final sequence states are recorded. **Connection switch mechanism:** Use a feature flag, database proxy rule, or load-balancer weight adjustment to redirect connections; do not manually edit connection strings on live hosts. Execute the switch in a single atomic operation using your chosen mechanism. Validate that new connections route to 16 before releasing the `ACCESS EXCLUSIVE` lock. **Partial failure handling:** If the switch mechanism reports partial success (some connections redirected, others not), do not release the lock. Investigate the failure, complete the redirection, and only then release the lock. If the switch cannot be completed within a defined timeout (e.g., 60 seconds), initiate rollback by releasing the lock and reverting the connection routing, then abort the cutover. **Option B (dual-write pause)** – Redirect new writes to both source and target using application-layer logic or a proxy that writes to both, monitor until no further writes occur on source, then cut over reads and remaining writes to 16. Option A is simpler; Option B avoids locking but adds complexity. Choose based on your application's tolerance for write unavailability.

8. **Decommission replication and old instance** – Before shutting down the old 13 instance, drop the replication slot on 13 using `pg_drop_replication_slot('<slot_name>')` to release retained WAL. If you must keep 13 reachable for rollback during the observation window, set `slot_name = inactive` or use `pg_replication_slot_advance()` to drain WAL incrementally and prevent disk filling while retaining the ability to resume replication if needed. Once the application runs cleanly on 16 for a defined observation period (e.g., 30–60 minutes) and rollback is no longer required, drop the subscription on 16, remove the replication slot, and shut down the old 13 instance.

---

**Riskiest Step:** Step 7 (the application cutover). This is the single point where you are actively switching the primary write target. If the application fails to connect, the new instance has an unseen corruption, or the cutover script has a bug, you risk an extended outage with no clear rollback path if you don't have one prepared.

**Concrete Fallback:** Before the cutover window, configure your application to support a rapid connection-string revert via feature flag or load-balancer rule. If the cutover fails mid-process or the application exhibits immediate critical errors on 16, switch application connections back to the PostgreSQL 13 primary within seconds. After reverting, assess whether the replication slot on 13 still holds WAL: if the slot was dropped per Step 8 instructions, you cannot resume streaming and must re-initialize replication from a fresh snapshot. To prevent WAL accumulation if keeping 13 available without active replication, periodically advance or drop the replication slot to prevent disk saturation.

**Sequence Handling in Fallback:** Sequence state is not replicated by logical replication. Capture `last_value` from every sequence at the moment replication reaches zero lag and before any connection routing changes (Step 7). If you must revert, compare the captured `last_value` against the current value on 13 using `SELECT last_value FROM sequence_name`. Set each sequence on 13 to `GREATEST(last_value, captured_last_value)` via `SELECT setval('sequence_name', GREATEST(last_value, <captured_value>))` to ensure that subsequent inserts on 13 assign values greater than those already replicated to 16, preventing duplicate key conflicts on re-sync.
